title: OrganiGram Holdings (OGI) Q3 2021 Earnings Call
text: OrganiGram Holdings Q3 2021 Earnings Call Summary. Revenue Performance: Gross revenue grew 51% from Q2 2021 and 31% from the same period in fiscal 2020 to $29.1 million, while net revenue grew 39% from Q2 and 13% from the same prior year period to $20.3 million. Profitability Metrics: The net loss in Q3 of 2021 was reduced from Q3 2020 loss of $90 million to $4 million. However, adjusted EBITDA increased to a negative $10.2 million from a negative $2.1 million in Q3 2020. Key Highlights: Q3 revenue improved from a challenged Q2, which was believed to represent a clear inflection point for the company, and the company had ramped up operations and staff to better fulfill demand in Q3. However, Q3 revenue was still negatively impacted by relatively suppressed demand from some provincial boards, particularly in Ontario, where strict COVID-19 restrictions resulted in retail stores being limited to 25% capacity for most of March and closed completely for the balance of the fiscal quarter. Earnings call held July 13, 2021.
